_meta.purpose: Canonical tool -> backend binding OVERRIDES. The model's vocabulary is canonical (the catalog tool names it trains on); this file is the one seam to change when you move a tool off Composio onto your own connection. An empty 'overrides' means defaults: GF_* -> our own 'gf' backend, everything else -> 'composio', with identity names/args.
_meta.shape: overrides[CANONICAL_TOOL] = { backend, backend_tool?, toolkit?, arg_map?: { canonical_arg: backend_arg } }
_meta.consumed_by: toolmap.py resolve(); the TS execution layer (gofarther-mcp / run-workflows) should mirror the same resolution.
